texto: The battle for the gospel in the opening years of the twenty-first century is being fought not primarily in the lecture rooms of North American seminaries but in the shanty towns, urban slums and villages of Africa, Asia and Latin America.
explicacao: Citação de Brian Stanley sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The battle for the gospel in the opening years of the twenty-first century is being fought not pr…” articula reflexao, gospel, mission em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mission.
